en: I was called and I came, what's up? William's just turned down Anna Scott.
You daft prick. No, no, no, no, it's actually quite sensible.
That painting isn't the original, is it?
Um, I think it might be, yeah.
ko: 음, 원본일 수도 있을 것 같아.

en: But she said she wanted to go out with you. Yeah.
ko: 하지만 그녀가 너와 사귀고 싶다고 했잖아. 응.

en: Well, you know, anyone saying they want to go out with you is pretty great, isn't it?
ko: 누군가 너와 사귀고 싶다고 말하는 건 꽤 멋진 일이잖아?

en: It was sort of sweet, actually.
I mean, I know she's an actress and all that, so she can deliver a line, but...
ko: 그녀가 배우라는 건 알지만, 대사를 잘 할 수는 있어도...
